name: abcjs
when_to_use: 需要把 ABC 记谱文本渲成可缩放五线谱 SVG,并可选做音符定位、播放进度高亮或浏览器合成播放时用它,而非手写 SVG——AI 原生在谱面雕刻、符杠碰撞、跨小节排版与音画同步上是零能力区。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到五线谱排版、符号避碰、连音/装饰音雕刻与 Web Audio 音画同步;它只需生成自己熟悉的 ABC notation-string,abcjs 即稳定产出 SVG 乐谱与可供合成器消费的 tune object。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to render ABC notation text as scalable staff-notation SVG, optionally with note positioning, playback-progress highlighting, or in-browser synthesized playback, instead of hand-writing SVG. Native AI has no capability for score engraving, beam collision handling, cross-measure layout, or audio-visual synchronization.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reliably handle staff layout, symbol collision avoidance, slur or ornament engraving, or Web Audio synchronization by default. It only needs to generate the ABC notation-string it already knows; abcjs then reliably produces an SVG score and a tune object for the synthesizer.

data_in.note: The primary input is an ABC notation string. Key signatures, time signatures, voices, lyrics, chords, ornaments, and other modifiers all remain inside that string rather than requiring a separate structure. render_options contains only high-frequency visual parameters.

schema.abc: string - ABC notation text; may be a single tune, a multi-tune tunebook, or a fragment. A complete score usually includes X:/T:/M:/L:/K: header fields

render_options?.responsive?: 'resize' - scale the SVG with the container width
render_options?.staffwidth?: number - score width (px) when not responsive
render_options?.visualTranspose?: integer - number of semitones for visual transposition only

spec.note: abcjs generates SVG; width can use responsive:'resize', while natural height varies with score length. The carrier viewport defaults to an explicit 360px with vertical scrolling, and long scores may override it with a larger pixel value. Do not use vh or percentage heights (hard rule 3).

data_in.note: 主输入是 ABC 记谱字符串;调号、拍号、声部、歌词、和弦、装饰音等修饰信息都留在该字符串内,不另造结构。render_options 只保留高频视觉参数。
data_in._why_no_example: ABC 是 AI 原生记法(可直接生成完整曲谱或片段),schema 足矣、不附 minimal example;与深 config 组件相反。

schema.abc: string —— ABC 记谱文本,可为单曲、多曲 tunebook 或片段;完整曲谱通常含 X:/T:/M:/L:/K: 头字段

render_options?.staffwidth?: number —— 非响应式时的谱面宽度(px)
render_options?.scale?: number —— 整体谱面缩放倍率
render_options?.visualTranspose?: integer —— 仅视觉移调的半音数

spec.note: abcjs 生成 SVG,宽度可用 responsive:'resize',自然高度随曲谱长度变化;载体视窗默认显式 360px 并纵向滚动,长谱可覆盖为更大像素值。禁用 vh/百分比高度(铁律 3)。

boot.note: 以上是无额外资产的视觉主路径。播放须由消费 AI 在真实用户手势内创建 AudioContext,再走 synth.CreateSynth().init({visualObj:tunes[0]}) → prime() → start();默认还会取外部 soundfont,不可自动播放。进度高亮与音符点击的回调由消费 AI 自己写,本条不规定统一事件出口。

uplink: display/local-interact 类,默认无需上行。若把音符点击或练习结果回传,由消费 AI 自行按载体接回调;不焊接统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:静态 SVG 可落 shadow 容器且无 head 注入;合成播放另需真实用户手势、Web Audio 与 soundfont 外网访问
carriers.codex: conditional:静态 SVG supported;合成播放仅在具备用户手势、Web Audio 与 soundfont 网络访问的浏览器载体可用

owner_note: abcjs 在 picks 中合并 notation 与 teach-sim 两个场景;本条以 teach-sim 为 owner,notation 共用同一条,不重复建档。

minimal.abc:
X:1
T:Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star
M:4/4
L:1/4
K:C
C C G G | A A G2 | F F E E | D D C2 |]
